title: Freshly Grilled Croatian Bean Sprouts Skillet
description: A high protein Croatian dish featuring charred bean sprouts, perfect for a brunch mood, this skillet is both aerated and delicious, made with kneaded ingredients for a unique texture.
instructions: Preheat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, garlic, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the bean sprouts to the bowl and toss to coat with the oil mixture.
Add the chopped onion to the bowl and toss to combine.
Pour the bean sprout mixture into the preheated skillet and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Use a spatula to create holes in the mixture and push the cooked bean sprouts to the sides of the skillet.
Add the crumbly feta cheese to the holes in the mixture and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the heat and let it cool for 1 minute.
Serve the skillet hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
